shared_properties: 120x180 frame size and champion costume silhouette.
High collar, cape panels, and staff prop silhouette.
Leftward facing root position on the upper-right anchor.
differences: Torso collapses downward by about 18 px across the sequence.
Staff tilts away from the body and exits the main attack line.
Cape panels fall vertically and the glow on the staff head fades out.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the defeat sequence and hold the final frame until the scene transitions.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/enemy_champion_defeated_8f_8fps.png through AssetServer and cache the atlas under enemy_champion_defeated_8f_8fps.
runtime_notes: Defeat sequence plays once at 8 fps and then pauses on frame 8.
The upper-right HP bar can drain during the first half of the sequence.
Reward transition can begin after the final frame with no additional pose swap.

context.usage: Shown after enemy HP reaches zero and before reward card selection returns the player to the lobby.

shape.silhouette: Falling champion silhouette with dropped shoulders, lowered staff, and hanging cape.

appendages.accessories: Staff focus, cape clasp, and shoulder sigil with dimmed glow.

specs.texture: Cape folds settle downward and the staff gem loses saturation over time.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with reduced highlights in the last three frames.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 960x180 px with eight 120x180 frames.
Final frame head height sits at least 18 px lower than frame 1 to sell the defeat state.
Staff glow falls to less than 15 percent of its starting brightness by frame 8.
